creator: meta@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #3)
net-im/mikutter 3.9.0 (currently 3.8.9 in the ports tree) requires addressable 2.6.0. That's why I'm updathing to 2.6.0. Need to create www/rubygem-addressable25?

Perhaps the version pin in net-im/mikutter can be relaxed.
